circuit_reconstructed_and_audited.note: The candidate graph was reconstructed and tested for necessity, sufficiency, specificity, faithfulness, and minimality; it failed replication and is rejected.

clean_committed_execution.note: The audit started from a clean committed worktree; scientific artifacts record clean source commits.

cpu_end_to_end.note: Deterministic Tier 0 generation, tiny JEPA train/save/load/eval, and planning metrics exist.

direct_qwen_verification.note: All 16 predictions were directly executed on new prompts; the failed top-ranked candidate is explicitly rejected.

documentation_and_manifests.note: Required handoff, literature, hypothesis, dataset, experiment, and result registries exist.

fast_tests_and_reproducibility.note: Full unittest discovery, Ruff, diff check, and reproducibility audit pass.

multiple_seed_principal_results.note: Principal world-model and LLM meta-model results use three registered seeds.

published_action_jepa.note: Source-informed small LeWorldModel variant passed its modeling gate on 3/3 seeds.

pushed_branch_before_output.note: HEAD matched its configured upstream before this audit artifact was created.

qwen_meta_model_baselines.note: The legacy conditional bottleneck and all required baselines were evaluated on fixed held-out splits across three seeds; the FP32 exact-JVP audit passed and withdrew the old nonlinear-advantage claim.

real_qwen_dataset.note: A checksummed 432-outcome real-Qwen intervention dataset exists with fixed splits.

real_qwen_hf.note: Pinned Hugging Face Qwen hooks, autograd, and direct interventions passed.

workspace_controls.note: Positive/negative controls pass and both tiny/published-reproduction workspace tests retain null results.

world_selective_intervention.note: A hidden-subspace intervention selectively changed future trajectory, planning costs, and selected actions on 2/3 seeds; the broader circuit gate remained negative.

scientific_boundary: Completion means the explicit repository criteria are implemented and audited. It does not turn rejected circuit/workspace hypotheses into positive findings.
